untranslatable_reason: Signal requires custom geometric pattern analysis (angle measurement, depth variance calculation, coefficient of variation across multiple retracement cycles, and spike boundary detection) that cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators. The core logic demands: (1) identification of prior retracement cycles with computed statistics, (2) real-time variance thresholds on angle/depth measurements, and (3) dynamic boundary detection for spike exclusion. These require custom computation beyond standard technical indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using ADX_14 > 25 to detect trending regimes where consistent geometric patterns are more likely to occur, and price deviation from SMA_20 for symmetry breakout exits. However, this does not capture the signal's core requirement of measuring and comparing geometric consistency across retracement patterns. The signal fundamentally requires a custom indicator or pattern-recognition algorithm.
